capabilities.name: Backend Development
capabilities.description: Capability for backend system implementation with Django and DRF.

capabilities.name: Database Modeling
capabilities.description: Capability for Django ORM model design.

capabilities.name: Frontend Development
capabilities.description: Capability for frontend implementation with Vue 3 and Pinia.

capabilities.name: State Management
capabilities.description: Capability for implementing Pinia state management.

capabilities.name: Code Review
capabilities.description: Capability for reviewing code for quality, security, and standards compliance.

capabilities.name: Security Audit
capabilities.description: Capability for security validation and audit.

capabilities.name: System Design
capabilities.description: Capability for architectural design and system-level decisions.

architect.name: architect
architect.description: System architecture authority responsible for cross-domain design decisions and architectural governance.
architect.role: System architecture authority responsible for system design decisions, architectural governance, cross-domain consistency, technology strategy, and resolving architectural conflicts.

backend.name: backend
backend.description: Backend execution agent responsible for Django, APIs, database, and backend system implementation.
backend.role: Responsible for implementing and maintaining backend systems including Django architecture, REST APIs, database models, performance, logging, monitoring, testing, and security.

frontend.name: frontend
frontend.description: Frontend execution agent responsible for Vue 3 UI, state management, UX, and frontend architecture.
frontend.role: Responsible for implementing UI and frontend architecture including Vue components, Pinia state management, UX/UI, responsiveness, accessibility, API integration, and performance optimization.

reviewer.name: reviewer
reviewer.description: Quality enforcement agent responsible for security, consistency, and engineering standards validation.
reviewer.role: Responsible for code review, policy enforcement, security validation, architectural consistency checks, and ensuring compliance with engineering standards.

workflows.name: Backend REST API Implementation
workflows.description: Standard workflow for implementing backend REST APIs with Django and DRF.

workflows.name: Frontend Feature Development
workflows.description: Standard workflow for implementing frontend features with Vue 3 and Pinia.
